title: Weak Authentication Bypass
description: An attacker could potentially bypass authentication mechanisms by exploiting weaknesses in the username/password authentication system. This could involve brute-force attacks, credential stuffing, or exploiting vulnerabilities in the authentication library itself.  Without knowing the specifics of the authentication implementation, this is a high-priority concern.
attack_vector: Brute-force attack, credential stuffing, vulnerability in authentication library, weak password policies.
mitigations: Enforce strong password policies (length, complexity, rotation)
Regularly audit authentication logs for suspicious activity
